title: Nick's Almost Vanilla Pack
description: Enter Minecraft with a bunch of QOL & Visual changes that make the game look Complete. From Revamped structures to QOL texture packs, This is the perfect Mod Pack for Vanilla lovers!
body:
Nick's Almost Vanilla Pack aims to provide a refreshed vanilla experience while staying close to the default look of Minecraft.

Unlike other Mod Packs, This one has a handful of Mods & Resource Packs to enchance the already existing things while aiming to add small detail that makes the game feel complete and full.


## Features

- **🐫 Better Structures** - re-discover the existing structures in a new way.
- **🪵 Truly Great Textures** - experience Minecraft with fresh vanilla texture packs.
- **🌍 Refreshed Generation** - the beauty of world generation all over again (but better)
- **✨ Stunning Visuals** - enchanced lightning & soft shadows will make the game stunning.
- **⚙️ Decent Optimization** - even low-end laptops/pcs will be able to run these mods!

## Multiplayer

### This Modpack Focuses on singleplayer, but could be played in multiplayer.
(Just put the generation & structures mods into the server, the rest is client sided)
